subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! A response is being penned to thy recent letter, and as to thy previous missive, God willing, it shall be answered ere long [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکتوب اخیر جواب مرقوم میگردد اما تحریر پیش انشاء الله عنقریب
subcodes.subjects: @law of inheritance, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
